{{CargoRelic
|name=The Scream
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=05-10
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On May 10, 1893, Edvard Munch created this pioneering expressionism artwork.

"The Scream" was a painting created by Munch when he was in depression. This piece features a distorted human which depicts anxiety and fear. It expressed the idea that anxiety and loneliness can be erased by a loud scream. The colors used by Munch were nor irregular yet not the painting carries elements of exaggeration, making  it an iconic piece of expressionism.

[Basic Info]

Type: Oil Painting<br>Collected by: National Museum of Norway<br>Height: 91 cm<br>Width: 73.5 cm
|fame=47
|art=74
|fth=44
|civ=36
|tech=42
|ss1=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +6<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss2=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +8<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +8<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss3=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +10<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss4=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +14<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +14<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss5=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +18<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss7=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +18<br>Jinx Points: 600/600<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: Snail ATK +30
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: This Relic's ART +10
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Purple ART Relics]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Jinx Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:ART Boost]]
[[Category:Ancient Fossil Boost]]
